title: Pidgeo & Beeta | Puzzle Platformer
description: A 2D co-op puzzle platformer where a pigeon and a beetle team up, using their unique abilities to solve puzzles, explore connected levels, and uncover a story of betrayal and revenge.

title: Camp Cupid | Dating Sim with Controller
description: A dating simulation game featuring a physical bow-and-arrow controller. Aim and shoot in this love-themed arcade game!

title: Datura | Study App
description: A study tracker that turns productivity into something to look forward to. Datura blends study session tracking, friendly competition, and avatar customization into one cohesive, full-stack app.

title: Sleep Vitamin Packaging | Product Design
description: My take on a fun packaging design for a sleep vitamin product, focused on appealing visuals, colors, and readable typography made in Adobe Illustrator.
